nasb.text: He shall build a house for My name, and he shall be My son and I will be his father; and I will establish the throne of his kingdom over Israel forever.’

esv.text: He shall build a house for my name. He shall be my son, and I will be his father, and I will establish his royal throne in Israel forever.’

cnv.text: 我兒啊，現在願耶和華與你同在，使你亨通，照著他應許你，建造耶和華你的　神的殿宇。

ccb.text: 他将为我的名建造殿宇，他要做我的儿子，我要做他的父亲，我要使他的王朝在以色列永远长存。’
